data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Implementation of threat detection and response systems.
data.technical_spec: Microsoft Defender for Cloud and Threat Intelligence solutions.

data.title: Encryption and Data Protection
data.description: Comprehensive data protection using encryption at rest and in transit.
data.technical_spec: TLS 1.2+ for data in transit, AES-256 encryption for data at rest.

data.title: Identity and Access Management
data.description: Integration of secure identity solutions for user authentication.
data.technical_spec: Azure Active Directory (AD) for identity verification.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Robust systems in place to mitigate Distributed Denial of Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: Azure DDoS Protection with automatic detection and mitigation.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Frequent security audits and compliance reviews are conducted.
data.technical_spec: Scheduled audits in compliance with ISO standards and other regulations.
